subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! Verily, 'Abdu'l-Bahá hath encountered shortcomings and manifold obstacles in both His written and spoken words [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان عبدالبهاء را در تحریر و تقریر تقصیر واقع و مانع کثیر حاصل البته
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
